use_cases: Primary call-to-action button with cyber/neon aesthetic for SaaS landing pages
Interactive button with hover glow effect for navigation bars and CTAs
Accent button for highlighting key actions in dark-themed interfaces
ai_summary: A stylized atomic button component featuring neon-inspired gradient borders and transparent background. The button features a cyan-to-magenta color scheme with dramatic glow effects on hover. Includes a commented-out shine animation effect. Designed for modern SaaS and developer tool interfaces where visual distinction and interactive feedback are priorities.
